top_signals.title: Bonds Rally as Weak Jobs Report Dims Fed Rate-Hike Expectations
top_signals.summary: Treasuries rallied after a weaker-than-expected jobs report prompted traders to scale back expectations that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates in the coming months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
top_signals.summary: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.
